visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
Checklist – Tourism
 For all types of visa applications, the following are the basic documents are required: 
- Application Form (
14A
) duly completed and signed by the applicant. Form 14A is also downloadable from:
www.ica.gov.sg (http://www.ica.gov.sg/)
- 2 recent passport sized colour photographs with white background.
- Passport and a photocopy of passport (pages showing personal details and the validity). Please ensure that the passport is valid for at least 6 months from the intended date of departure
                                                                            to Singapore.
- Travel itinerary (Applicants are advised to confirm hotel and flight reservation only after the visa has been approved)
- Letter of identification from the employer/sponsor, stamped by the Chamber of Commerce.
- A Letter of Invitation
(V39A), (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
from Singapore contact with a mention of NRIC number if application
                                                                            is made for Tourism purpose. (Letter of invitation issued by Royal Embassy of Singapore in Saudi Arabia to be duly attested by Ministry of Foreign affairs (Wazart Kharjiah). The
                                                                            Embassy will not accept invitation letter from hotels, travel agencies, airlines and travel and tour offices.
- Official translation of the documents are required if they are not in the English Language.
- Visa processing fee BHD 8 per application (non-refundable)
Note: 
- The applicant and the local contact may be required to furnish additional documents and information whenever necessary.
- Incomplete/illegible forms and /or documents submitted may result in the application being rejected or the processing delayed.
- Every application for a visa will be considered on its own merits.
- Possession of a visa does not guarantee entry into Singapore. Visitors must also meet entry requirements such as holding a valid passport, sufficient funds for the period of stay
                                                                            in Singapore and complete travel itinerary.
- All documents must be submitted on A4 size paper only.
- Applications without a Letter of Invitation
(V39A) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
without a mentioned of NRIC number will not
                                                                            be accepted.
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing time would normally take 5 working days excluding the day of submission and the Saudi Arabia and Singapore week-ends. However, some applications may take longer if further
                                                                        verification is required. Please also note that the courier of Application documents to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, takes approximately 2 working days additionally.
visa_types.forms:
Download Application Form here
 
Dear Applicants,
If you are sending your application by a representative please fill the “Authorization Form” as VFS officer will not accept any visa application without Authorization Form along with his/her ID card copy.

Authorization Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1NwtymNhr7VnO6nRVvoqpR/da7816222b74587a5e6fe806e5fc53e4/authorization-form-new.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Find out whether, depending on your citizenship, country of long-term residence, and the duration and reasons for your stay, you need a visa to enter Singapore
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Find out whether, depending on your citizenship, country of long-term residence, and the duration and reasons for your stay, you need a visa to enter Singapore

## Visa Fees

## Visa Fees applicable for Tourist

[Table:Tourism]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service fee of BHD 16 and a Mandatory  two way courier fee of BHD 11 (inclusive of  10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.

## Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee , service fee and Mandatory courier fee is payable at the visa application centre in cash and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Checklist – Tourism
 For all types of visa applications, the following are the basic documents are required: 
- Application Form (
14A
) duly completed and signed by the applicant. Form 14A is also downloadable from:
www.ica.gov.sg (http://www.ica.gov.sg/)
- 2 recent passport sized colour photographs with white background.
- Passport and a photocopy of passport (pages showing personal details and the validity). Please ensure that the passport is valid for at least 6 months from the intended date of departure
                                                                            to Singapore.
- Travel itinerary (Applicants are advised to confirm hotel and flight reservation only after the visa has been approved)
- Letter of identification from the employer/sponsor, stamped by the Chamber of Commerce.
- A Letter of Invitation
(V39A), (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
from Singapore contact with a mention of NRIC number if application
                                                                            is made for Tourism purpose. (Letter of invitation issued by Royal Embassy of Singapore in Saudi Arabia to be duly attested by Ministry of Foreign affairs (Wazart Kharjiah). The
                                                                            Embassy will not accept invitation letter from hotels, travel agencies, airlines and travel and tour offices.
- Official translation of the documents are required if they are not in the English Language.
- Visa processing fee BHD 8 per application (non-refundable)
Note: 
- The applicant and the local contact may be required to furnish additional documents and information whenever necessary.
- Incomplete/illegible forms and /or documents submitted may result in the application being rejected or the processing delayed.
- Every application for a visa will be considered on its own merits.
- Possession of a visa does not guarantee entry into Singapore. Visitors must also meet entry requirements such as holding a valid passport, sufficient funds for the period of stay
                                                                            in Singapore and complete travel itinerary.
- All documents must be submitted on A4 size paper only.
- Applications without a Letter of Invitation
(V39A) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/mWecYQuGAM8I4gAVik10Q/b083f435f93aaeef085ab258ff263646/formv39-28.06.21-new.pdf)
without a mentioned of NRIC number will not
                                                                            be accepted.

## Photo Specifications
- The photograph must be in color.
- It should be without border.
- It should have a light colored background only so that features are distinguishable and in contrast against the background.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clear.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 4 cm X 5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 3 months old.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, the main characteristics of the face must be apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes and eyebrows must not be covered; the forehead should
                                                                            be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph must show facing square on to the camera, not looking over the shoulder or tilted, and showing both edges of the face clearly.
- It should be taken with uniform lighting and not show shadows or flash reflections on the face and no red eye
- If wearing glasses the photograph must show the eyes clearly with no flash reflection off the glasses and no tinted lenses (if possible, avoid heavy frames – lighter framed glasses
                                                                            to be worn). Make sure the frame does not cover any part of the eye.
- The photograph must show alone (no chair backs, toys or other people visible) looking at the camera with a neutral expression and the mouth closed.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned and color photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Processing time would normally take 5 working days excluding the day of submission and the Saudi Arabia and Singapore week-ends. However, some applications may take longer if further
                                                                        verification is required. Please also note that the courier of Application documents to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, takes approximately 2 working days additionally.

## Download Forms
Download Application Form here
 
Dear Applicants,
If you are sending your application by a representative please fill the “Authorization Form” as VFS officer will not accept any visa application without Authorization Form along with his/her ID card copy.

Authorization Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1NwtymNhr7VnO6nRVvoqpR/da7816222b74587a5e6fe806e5fc53e4/authorization-form-new.pdf)
